3278750.name: FSKN
3278750.description:
FSKN is a high-tech game with an interesting plot and exciting gameplay in the action genre, based on an important problem of modern society, which has not yet found sufficient coverage in computer games.

The genre of the game assumes high dynamics of the gameplay, fully three-dimensional environment, a large number of characters in the game and an easy-to-understand storyline.

From an agent embedded in a group of Russian mafiosi, serving the transportation of drug cartels, the FDCN of Russia receives information about the supply of heroin by sea. The agent gives the approximate coordinates of the place of transshipment of the goods, which should take place near an abandoned labor camp on the Pacific coast of Russia. According to the agent's information, the drug is to be distributed throughout the country.

This edition also includes the “Old Fort” add-on!

During a special operation to uncover drug trafficking through Europe, an undercover agent is kidnapped and placed in an old abandoned fort infested with criminals. Your task is to get out of the mess and solve the case!

Features:

  • Exciting missions in the spirit of a spy thriller reminiscent of action-packed action movies!

  • A shocking storyline based on real events.

  • A detailed recreation of the coordinated work of the Russian Federation's anti-drug police department.

  • Detailed locations.

  • Real-life weapons.

  • Unexpected plot twists.
3278750.supported_languages:
英语, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
